interactionPlan.concept: Understanding derivatives along an edge and their relationship with tangent directions in geometry.

interactions.label: Change angle θ
interactions.teaches: How changing θ affects the Y-coordinate derivative along the edge.

interactions.label: Show/Hide normal and tangent
interactions.teaches: Visualizes the orthogonal relationship between the tangent and normal vectors relative to the edge.

interactions.label: Horizontal edge alignment
interactions.teaches: Illustrates the concept that a horizontal edge results in a zero derivative in the tangent direction.

interactions.label: Move tangent vector
interactions.teaches: Demonstrates how the direction of the tangent vector affects the dot product with the gradient.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Initial view should place the edge at the center, looking along the plane for clear visibility of both vectors and edge.
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure that the visualization clearly differentiates between the x, y, and tangential derivatives with labeled vectors and axes.

gpt-4o.notes: Interactive features enhance the model, but initial camera position could be improved slightly.
